authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a clear, practical guide to building AI workflows with memory for business use cases, specifically focusing on a support triage workflow.
It includes actionable steps, tools, and metrics that directly address the target audience's needs (founders, operators, marketers).
The content avoids generic AI advice and provides specific implementation details, which aligns with the business problem of avoiding 'useless' automation.
The article includes a strong expert insight and real business impact metrics.
It provides a step-by-step guide with clear implementation instructions and troubleshooting tips.
The use of authoritative sources and internal linking strategy supports the article's credibility and SEO value.
recommendedFixes: Add a section on 'Why Memory Matters' to reinforce the core concept early in the article.
Include a brief comparison of AI with and without memory to clarify the value proposition for skeptical readers.
Add a visual (e.g., workflow diagram) to illustrate the support triage process and memory components.
Clarify the difference between AI automation and AI with memory in the introduction to set the right context.
Add a short summary of how to get started for readers who want to implement immediately.
Include a section on common mistakes to avoid when building AI workflows with memory.
Add a checklist or step-by-step guide for implementation with clear actions and tools needed.
Include metrics and KPIs to track success and failure in AI workflows.
Add troubleshooting tips for common implementation issues like API timeouts, low-confidence outputs, and duplicate tickets.
Conclude with a call to action for readers to start small and scale up, with a link to book an automation consult.
